task_completion.description: Open the concert program document and the style guide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processor (e.g., Calligra Words) open with 'concert_program.odt' and a text editor or viewer open with 'concert_program_style_guide.txt'.

task_completion.description: Format the orchestra name, concert title, and body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The orchestra name ('Metropolitan Philharmonic Orchestra') and concert title ('Masterworks Series IV: Echoes of the New World') are formatted as titles (e.g., larger font, centered). Body text paragraphs are formatted consistently according to standard conventions (e.g., specific font, alignment, or indentation).

task_completion.description: Format the composers and work titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Composers (e.g., 'Ludwig van Beethoven') and work titles (e.g., 'Overture to Egmont') have specific rich text formatting applied, such as bolding, italics, or specific alignment, distinguishing them from plain text.
The word 'INTERMISSION' is formatted distinctly, such as being centered, bolded, or italicized, as per typical stage direction conventions.
Headings like 'Program Notes', 'Acknowledgments', and artist names (e.g., 'Elena Vasquez') are formatted as headings (e.g., larger font size, bold, or underlined).

The agent saves the document to '/home/ga/Documents/concert_program.odt' (e.g., clicking the save icon, using a save dialog, or the word processor shows no unsaved changes indicator in the title bar).

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting actions are performed using the GUI of a word processor (like Calligra Words), not via terminal commands, scripts, or markdown text editing.

integrity.description: The agent applied actual rich text formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document shows visual rich text formatting (fonts, sizes, bold/italics), not just plain text with markdown symbols (like **bold**).

integrity.description: The original text content was preserved during formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The body text samples (e.g., 'Elena Vasquez is internationally recognized') and other content remain intact and were not deleted or replaced with dummy text.
